stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
According to the Annex, which of the following statements are true regarding the Central Warning Panel (CWP)?

1. HYD 1, HYD 2, AUX HYD and HYD LVL are caution lights
2. BAT T is warning light
3. OIL T is warning light
4. SAND F.FILT, LDG LIGHT and EPU DOOR are safe operation lights
5. FUEL lights are both yellow and red
6. EPU DOOR is caution light
